Class DashboardController

java.lang.Object
com.finvision.controller.DashboardController
@Controller public class DashboardController extends Object
Serves the main dashboard and all financial-overview pages in Finvision.

Pages handled:

  • /dashboard — summary of budgeted vs. actual income/expenses
  • /spending-visualization — pie-chart breakdown of actual spending
  • /tracker — savings tracker with total saved this month
  • /budget — budget entry form (pre-filled if a budget exists)
  • /budget-history — month-by-month budget vs. actual history
  • /predictive-cash-flow — 6-month projected cash-flow forecast
  • /alerts — bill alerts and budget status overview
  • /insights — spending insight summary

    Renders the Budget History page showing month-by-month budgeted vs.
    String

    Renders the main dashboard with both budgeted and actual financial summaries.
    String
    insights(Principal principal, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
    Renders the Insights page with a high-level spending summary.
    String
    predictiveCashFlow(Principal principal, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
    Renders the Predictive Cash Flow page with a 6-month rolling forecast based on the current month's income and actual spending rate.

    Renders the Spending Visualization page with a pie chart of actual expenses.
    String
    tracker(Principal principal, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
    Renders the Savings Tracker page with this month's total amount saved (income minus actual expenses, floored at zero).

  • Constructor Details

    • DashboardController

      public DashboardController()

  • Method Details

    • dashboard

      @GetMapping("/dashboard") public String dashboard(Principal principal, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Renders the main dashboard with both budgeted and actual financial summaries.

      When a budget exists, populates income, expenses, savings, savings rate, spending percentage, status label, and pie-chart data for both the planned budget and actual (receipt-based) spending.

      Parameters:
      principal - the currently authenticated user
      model - Spring MVC model
      Returns:
      the Dashboard template

    • spendingVisualization

      @GetMapping("/spending-visualization") public String spendingVisualization(Principal principal, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Renders the Spending Visualization page with a pie chart of actual expenses.
      Parameters:
      principal - the currently authenticated user
      model - Spring MVC model
      Returns:
      the SpendingVisualization template

    • tracker

      @GetMapping("/tracker") public String tracker(Principal principal, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Renders the Savings Tracker page with this month's total amount saved (income minus actual expenses, floored at zero).
      Parameters:
      principal - the currently authenticated user
      model - Spring MVC model
      Returns:
      the Trackerpage template

    • budget

      @GetMapping("/budget") public String budget(Principal principal, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Displays the Budget Set form, pre-filled with the existing budget for the current month if one exists.
      Parameters:
      principal - the currently authenticated user
      model - Spring MVC model
      Returns:
      the BudgetSet template

    • budgetHistory

      @GetMapping("/budget-history") public String budgetHistory(Principal principal, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Renders the Budget History page showing month-by-month budgeted vs. actual spending, including chart data for a bar/line visualization.
      Parameters:
      principal - the currently authenticated user
      model - Spring MVC model
      Returns:
      the BudgetHistory template

    • predictiveCashFlow

      @GetMapping("/predictive-cash-flow") public String predictiveCashFlow(Principal principal, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Renders the Predictive Cash Flow page with a 6-month rolling forecast based on the current month's income and actual spending rate.
      Parameters:
      principal - the currently authenticated user
      model - Spring MVC model
      Returns:
      the PredictiveCashFlow template

    • alerts

      @GetMapping("/alerts") public String alerts(Principal principal, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Renders the Alerts & Notifications page with budget status and bill list.

      Safe defaults are set before fetching data so the template never renders with missing attributes even if no budget exists.

      Parameters:
      principal - the currently authenticated user
      model - Spring MVC model
      Returns:
      the AlertsNotifications template

    • insights

      @GetMapping("/insights") public String insights(Principal principal, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Renders the Insights page with a high-level spending summary.
      Parameters:
      principal - the currently authenticated user
      model - Spring MVC model
      Returns:
      the Insightspage template
